title: Full faith and credit of acknowledgments
doc_html:
§393.  Full faith and credit of acknowledgments

Full faith and credit shall be given by Louisiana courts to an affidavit acknowledging paternity executed in any state in accordance with the laws and procedures of that state.

Acts 1997, No. 1243, §1.
doc_text:
§393.  Full faith and credit of acknowledgments
Full faith and credit shall be given by Louisiana courts to an affidavit acknowledging paternity executed in any state in accordance with the laws and procedures of that state.
Acts 1997, No. 1243, §1.
